description: AppleScript campaign (docs/design/lab.md §4.3): creation, reads, mutation, launch behavior, and the private sdef surfaces, each verified row-level against the DB. Reads run first (pristine golden+warm-up state, so counts are regression-locked). Hazard group (empty trash; schedule-on-repeating crash probe) runs last. A00 (sdef inventory) is covered statically by design doc §8 + vendor/manifest.json (trial sdef byte-identical to MAS).

probes.title: built-in list enumeration incl. Logbook and Trash (counts locked to golden state)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Inbox"
tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Today"
tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Anytime"
tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Someday"
tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Upcoming"
tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Logbook"
tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Trash"

probes.title: project children read: does 'to dos of project' include heading-contained children?

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to name of to dos of project "LAB-PROJ-HEADINGS"
tell application "Things3" to name of to dos of project "LAB-PROJ-PLAIN"
tell application "Things3" to name of to dos of area "LAB-AREA-A"

probes.title: repeating-template visibility: list reads vs direct id fetch (the things.py blind spot)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to name of to dos of list "Someday"
tell application "Things3" to name of to do id "{seed:LAB-REPEAT-DAILY}"
tell application "Things3" to name of to dos of list "Upcoming"

probes.title: tag reads: direct tags only — inherited area/project tags are not materialized

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to tag names of to do id "{seed:LAB-TAGGED-BOTH}"
tell application "Things3" to tag names of to do id "{seed:LAB-P-1}"
tell application "Things3" to tag names of area "LAB-AREA-A"
tell application "Things3" to name of tags

probes.title: selected to dos: UI-coupled read returns empty without a user selection

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to count of selected to dos

probes.title: make new to do (default locus) — where does it land?

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A01-TODO", notes:"created via applescript"}

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A01-TODO'

probes.title: make new to do at a specific locus (beginning of list Today)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do at beginning of list "Today" with properties {name:"A01B-TODO"}

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A01B-TODO' AND start=1

probes.title: make new project (plain + directly into an area)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new project with properties {name:"A02-PROJ"}

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A02-PROJ' AND type=1

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new project with properties {name:"A02-PROJ-AREA", area:area "LAB-AREA-A"}

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A02-PROJ-AREA' AND type=1

probes.title: make new area — the URL scheme cannot do this

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new area with properties {name:"A03-AREA"}

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMArea WHERE title='A03-AREA'

probes.title: make new tag — the URL scheme cannot do this

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new tag with properties {name:"a04-tag"}

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTag WHERE title='a04-tag'

probes.title: tag hierarchy via parent tag property

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set parent tag of tag "a04-tag" to tag "prio"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTag WHERE title='a04-tag' AND parent='{seed:prio}'

probes.title: create with full properties bundle (notes, due date, existing tags)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A06-TODO", notes:"bundle", due date:(current date) + 5 * days, tag names:"lab-tag-1, high"}

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A06-TODO' AND deadline IS NOT NULL

probes.title: rename + notes via property setters

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A20-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A20-TARGET'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set name of to do id "{uuid:A20-TARGET}" to "A20-RENAMED"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A20-RENAMED'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set notes of to do id "{uuid:A20-RENAMED}" to "edited notes"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A20-RENAMED' AND notes='edited notes'

probes.title: schedule a normal to-do into Upcoming (the gap 'move' cannot fill)

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A21B-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A21B-TARGET'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to schedule to do id "{uuid:A21B-TARGET}" for (current date) + 2 * days

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A21B-TARGET' AND start=2 AND startDate=132805504

probes.title: move between built-in lists (Today, Someday)

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A22-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A22-TARGET'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to move to do id "{uuid:A22-TARGET}" to list "Today"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A22-TARGET' AND start=1 AND startDate=132805248

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to move to do id "{uuid:A22-TARGET}" to list "Someday"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A22-TARGET' AND start=2

probes.title: assign project/area via property setters (move's documented gap)

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A22B-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A22B-TARGET'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set project of to do id "{uuid:A22B-TARGET}" to project "LAB-PROJ-PLAIN"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A22B-TARGET' AND project='{seed:LAB-PROJ-PLAIN}'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set area of to do id "{uuid:A22B-TARGET}" to area "LAB-AREA-B"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A22B-TARGET' AND area='{seed:LAB-AREA-B}'

probes.title: move to list Upcoming fails (documented: schedule is the only path)

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A22C-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A22C-TARGET'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to move to do id "{uuid:A22C-TARGET}" to list "Upcoming"

probes.title: status setters: completed / canceled; Logbook membership timing

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A23-DONE"}
tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A23-CANCEL"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A23-CANCEL'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Logbook"
tell application "Things3" to set status of to do id "{uuid:A23-DONE}" to completed

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A23-DONE' AND status=3

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set status of to do id "{uuid:A23-CANCEL}" to canceled

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A23-CANCEL' AND status=2

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Logbook"

probes.title: reopen: status open clears stopDate

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set status of to do id "{uuid:A23-DONE}" to open

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A23-DONE' AND status=0

probes.title: delete to-do: moves to Trash (trashed=1), links intact, no tombstone

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A24-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A24-TARGET'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to delete to do id "{uuid:A24-TARGET}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A24-TARGET' AND trashed=1

probes.title: delete project: project and children both land in Trash

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new project with properties {name:"A24B-PROJ"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A24B-PROJ' AND type=1

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A24B-CHILD", project:project "A24B-PROJ"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A24B-CHILD' AND project='{uuid:A24B-PROJ}'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to delete project "A24B-PROJ"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A24B-PROJ' AND trashed=1

probes.title: delete area: PERMANENT (row gone, tombstone written) — not Trash

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new area with properties {name:"A25-AREA"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMArea WHERE title='A25-AREA'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to delete area "A25-AREA"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TMArea WHERE title='A25-AREA')

probes.title: delete area containing a task: what happens to the task?

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new area with properties {name:"A25B-AREA"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMArea WHERE title='A25B-AREA'

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A25B-CHILD", area:area "A25B-AREA"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A25B-CHILD' AND area IS NOT NULL

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to delete area "A25B-AREA"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TMArea WHERE title='A25B-AREA')

probes.title: delete tag: permanent, assignments cascade

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new tag with properties {name:"a26-tag"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTag WHERE title='a26-tag'

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set tag names of to do id "{seed:LAB-ANYTIME-1}" to "a26-tag"

setup.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTaskTag tt JOIN TMTag t ON tt.tags=t.uuid WHERE tt.tasks='{seed:LAB-ANYTIME-1}' AND t.title='a26-tag'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to delete tag "a26-tag"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TMTag WHERE title='a26-tag')

probes.title: log completed now: forces Logbook collection of completed items

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A28-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A28-TARGET'

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set status of to do id "{uuid:A28-TARGET}" to completed

setup.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A28-TARGET' AND status=3

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to log completed now

probes.title: to-do to project conversion attempts are unsupported (class is immutable)

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A29-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A29-TARGET'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set class of to do id "{uuid:A29-TARGET}" to project

probes.title: checklist access: no checklist class in the sdef — errors out

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to checklist items of to do id "{seed:LAB-INBOX-2}"

probes.title: heading access: no heading class in the sdef — errors out

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to first heading of project "LAB-PROJ-HEADINGS"

probes.title: AppleEvent read to CLOSED Things: auto-launches in background (no focus steal)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to count of to dos of list "Inbox"

probes.title: AppleEvent write to CLOSED Things: auto-launch + mutation, still background

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A41-TODO"}

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A41-TODO'

probes.title: explicit activate: the only AppleScript path that steals focus

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to activate

probes.title: AppleScript mutation while a URL-error modal is open (T13 cross-vector)

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"A43-TARGET"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A43-TARGET'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set name of to do id "{uuid:A43-TARGET}" to "A43-RENAMED"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='A43-RENAMED'

probes.title: PRIVATE: _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in — native reorder (would obsolete the bounce hack)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A50-X'
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='A50-Y'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ reorder to dos in list "Today" with ids "{uuid:A50-Y},{uuid:A50-X}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='A50-Y') < (SELECT todayIndex FROM TMTask WHERE title='A50-X')

probes.title: PRIVATE: _private_experimental_ json property — exposes checklist + recurrence data invisible elsewhere?

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ json of to do id "{seed:LAB-INBOX-2}"
tell application "Things3" to _private_experimental_ json of to do id "{seed:LAB-REPEAT-DAILY}"

probes.title: parse quicksilver input: quick-capture syntax creates a to-do

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to parse quicksilver input "A52-QS"

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title LIKE 'A52-QS%'

probes.title: show quick entry panel: spawns a panel window (tier 3, documented for completeness)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to show quick entry panel

probes.title: edit command: opens the item for editing in the UI (disruptive)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to edit to do id "{seed:LAB-ANYTIME-1}"

probes.title: empty trash: PERMANENT delete of all trashed rows, tombstones written

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to empty trash

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE trashed=1)

probes.title: HAZARD: schedule on a repeating template — the AppleScript T12 analogue

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to schedule to do id "{seed:LAB-REPEAT-DAILY}" for (current date) + 1 * days
